inscription: Elsa Ingmarsh is recorded among the dead of Riveria.

name: Sepulcher of Kell Oststone
inscription: Kell Oststone is recorded among the dead of Marara.

name: Sepulcher of Petra Rivora the 2nd
inscription: Petra Rivora the 2nd's name was set down for those who came after.

name: Tomb of Hale Fenwold
inscription: Hale Fenwold's kin kept this memory.

name: Crypt of Pela Grimhill
inscription: Remember Pela Grimhill of Riveria.

name: Tomb of Ines Fenovar the 2nd
inscription: Ines Fenovar the 2nd's name was set down for those who came after.

name: Tomb of Ora Fenwold
inscription: Ora Fenwold is recorded among the dead of Marara.
